overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in western attire walking along a dirt trail through a grassy prairie. The scene features overcast skies, autumn-colored trees lining the path, and a brief encounter with a horse rider. The environment transitions from forest edge to open grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with dirt trail along forest edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass with a dense forest on the left side

entered.detail: muddy dirt path winding through tall grass and wildflowers
dense line of trees with autumn-colored foliage forming the forest edge
rolling green hills covered in tall grass and yellow wildflowers
large gray rock sitting beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through a grassy prairie, with a dense deciduous forest lining the left side and open rolling hills visible to the right. A large boulder sits beside the path as the character moves steadily forward under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow trail with passing horse rider

events.description: rider on horseback gallops past from right to left on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the trail as a mounted rider passes by closely on the right

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback galloping past on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a rider on horseback suddenly gallops past on the right side of the trail. The large boulder is left behind, and the forest edge draws closer to the left while the open prairie stretches ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with scattered trees and winding trail

agents.ego_description: walking through increasingly open grassland as the forest gives way to scattered individual trees

entered.detail: individual oak trees with reddish leaves scattered across the prairie landscape

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through open prairie land, with the dense forest now behind and only scattered oak trees dotting the landscape. The character walks steadily along the winding dirt path toward rolling hills in the distance, surrounded by tall grass and wildflowers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail that transitions from a sheltered forest edge into an expansive, open prairie. It begins with the character walking steadily past a large boulder, flanked by a dense deciduous forest on the left and rolling hills to the right under overcast skies. As the journey continues, a rider on horseback suddenly gallops past on the right, leaving the boulder behind as the forest edge momentarily tightens before the landscape opens up. The scene then shifts into wide prairie land where the dense woods recede into the background, replaced by scattered oak trees and tall grass. Finally, the camera follows the character along the curving path toward distant rolling hills and wildflowers under the gray sky.
